collector/benthos.purpose: Orchestration layer for the Benthos/Redpanda Connect collector binary: wires together custom BatchInput plugins (input/), Bloblang functions (bloblang/), shared utilities (internal/), leader-election infrastructure (services/), and deployable YAML pipeline presets (presets/). No Go source lives here directly — this folder defines the full plugin surface and runtime config that cmd/benthos-collector blank-imports to activate.

patterns.name: Blank-import activation
patterns.description: All plugin packages (input/, bloblang/) register themselves via Go init(). cmd/benthos-collector must blank-import each package; forgetting an import silently omits the plugin at runtime with no error.

patterns.name: Sub-package per concern
patterns.description: input/ = BatchInput plugins only, bloblang/ = Bloblang function registrations only, internal/ = shared utilities (no plugin logic), services/ = cross-cutting infrastructure (leader election), presets/ = pure YAML configs. Do not mix concerns across these boundaries.
patterns.example: // new input plugin: collector/benthos/input/myplugin.go; new Bloblang fn: collector/benthos/bloblang/myfn.go

patterns.name: Leader-election gate on replicated work
patterns.description: Inputs that must run on only one replica poll leaderelection.IsLeader(res) from service.Resources in Connect/ReadBatch. Absent key defaults to true so single-replica deployments need no election service.

patterns.name: init()-based plugin registration
patterns.description: Every plugin file calls service.RegisterBatchInput (or the Bloblang equivalent) inside an init() function. Registration must happen before process start; calling outside init() causes the plugin to be unavailable at pipeline construction time.

patterns.name: Environment-variable substitution in YAML presets
patterns.description: All secrets and endpoint URLs in presets/ use ${ENV_VAR} Benthos interpolation — never hardcoded values. This allows config files to be shipped without recompiling the binary.

key_file_guides.role: One BatchInput plugin per file; each registered in init() via service.RegisterBatchInput. Provides Connect/ReadBatch/Close lifecycle.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Holding in.mu across network calls; returning errors from ReadBatch for transient per-resource failures (halts pipeline); omitting a dedicated XxxInputConfig() factory function.

key_file_guides.role: Registers custom Bloblang functions via init(); must be blank-imported to activate. Side-effect-only — exports nothing.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Registering duplicate function names across files (startup panic); performing I/O inside the returned closure (run on every invocation); exporting any symbols.

key_file_guides.role: Two-tier graceful shutdown primitive (CloseAtLeisure / CloseNow) used by all plugins.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Forgetting ShutdownComplete() in a component goroutine — orchestrators block on HasClosedChan indefinitely.

key_file_guides.role: Delivery-guaranteed message routing via Transaction/Ack pattern; buffered chan<-error (cap 1) for ack path.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Calling Ack more than once — buffered channel send is not idempotent and will block or panic.

key_file_guides.role: Kubernetes lease-based leader election; exposes state via service.Resources generic map under IsLeaderKey.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Reusing a LeaderElector instance across election cycles (single-use in client-go); calling Start with context.Background() (breaks shutdown cancellation).

key_file_guides.role: Receive-validate-forward CloudEvent ingestion pipeline preset; no transformation logic.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding enrichment logic here; using generic http_client output instead of the custom openmeter plugin.

key_file_guides.role: Kubernetes billing pipeline deriving duration_seconds from schedule_interval metadata at mapping time.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Omitting .number(0) on resource_quantity() calls — pods without resource requests produce nil mapping errors.

anti_patterns: Registering a plugin outside init() — Benthos requires init-time registration before the process starts
Adding business logic or plugin registrations to internal/ — it is a pure utilities layer with no plugin surface
Reading IsLeaderKey directly via res.GetGeneric instead of using leaderelection.IsLeader(res) — misses the absent-key=true default for single-replica deployments
Exporting symbols from collector/benthos/bloblang — this package is side-effect-only and must export nothing
Returning a hard error from ReadBatch for transient per-resource failures — non-fatal errors must be logged and skipped; a returned error halts the entire Benthos pipeline

decisions.decision: Sub-package per concern (input, bloblang, internal, services, presets) rather than a flat package
decisions.rationale: Keeps plugin registration, shared utilities, infrastructure services, and YAML configs independently evolvable and prevents accidental coupling between Benthos plugin lifecycle and utility code.

decisions.decision: Leader state stored in service.Resources generic map with absent-key defaulting to true
decisions.rationale: Single-replica deployments work without configuring a leader-election service; service.Resources is the only cross-plugin shared-state mechanism Benthos exposes, so no alternative channel is available.

decisions.decision: Presets are pure YAML with no Go code
decisions.rationale: Pipeline configs can be updated and shipped without recompiling the binary; environment-variable substitution handles all deployment-specific values.

code_examples.scenario: Registering a new BatchInput plugin that gates work on leader election

collector/quickstart.purpose: Local demo environment for the Benthos collector: a Docker Compose stack that runs openmeter, the custom-plugin collector, and a synthetic CloudEvent seeder. Contains only YAML configs and one docker-compose.yaml — no Go source. Role is quickstart demonstration, not production deployment or reusable pipeline template.

patterns.name: Environment-variable-driven configuration
patterns.description: All URLs, tokens, and tunable parameters use ${ENV_VAR} Benthos interpolation or Docker Compose environment: blocks — never hardcoded values.

patterns.name: Layered config loading
patterns.description: The collector service loads config.yaml first (bootstrap: HTTP API, metrics, cache), then overlays resources/*.yaml (shared infrastructure) and streams/*.yaml (processors). Stream processors and cache declarations must NOT go in the top-level config.yaml.

patterns.name: Healthcheck-gated depends_on
patterns.description: Each service declares a wget healthcheck; downstream services use condition: service_healthy to ensure openmeter is ready before collector starts, and collector before seeder.

patterns.name: Switch output with DEBUG stdout branch
patterns.description: Output configs use a switch with a DEBUG env-var branch that short-circuits to stdout for local inspection without altering the real output path.

patterns.name: Include base stack rather than duplicate
patterns.description: docker-compose.yaml includes ../../quickstart/docker-compose.yaml and only adds collector and seeder services, reusing the canonical openmeter stack definition.

key_file_guides.role: Extends ../../quickstart/docker-compose.yaml and adds collector + seeder services with volume mounts binding local YAML configs.
key_file_guides.watch_for: OPENMETER_TOKEN is absent from the default collector environment — add it if the target OpenMeter instance requires auth.

key_file_guides.role: Bootstrap config only: HTTP management API, Prometheus metrics, optional OTel tracer stub. Stream logic lives in streams/.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding stream processors here — they belong in streams/; renaming dedupe_cache label without updating all cache: references in stream processors silently bypasses deduplication.

key_file_guides.role: In-memory deduplication cache with 1h TTL shared by stream processors via the dedupe_cache label.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Switching to Redis requires updating both this file and all cache: label references in stream processor configs.

key_file_guides.role: Synthetic CloudEvent generator: generate input → Bloblang mapping → http_client output to collector ingest endpoint. Demo-only.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Removing specversion or id fields from the generated CloudEvent breaks ingest API validation; do not add business logic here.

anti_patterns: Hardcoding OPENMETER_URL or OPENMETER_TOKEN instead of environment variable interpolation
Adding transformation or enrichment logic to seeder/config.yaml — it is a synthetic demo generator, not a reusable pipeline template
Adding stream processors or cache declarations to collector/config.yaml top-level instead of streams/ and resources/ sub-files
Using generic http_client output instead of the custom openmeter output plugin in collector stream output configs
Enabling debug_endpoints: true outside local development — exposes internal Benthos state

decisions.decision: Include ../../quickstart/docker-compose.yaml rather than duplicating service definitions
decisions.rationale: Reuses the canonical openmeter stack; collector quickstart only adds the collector and seeder services on top, avoiding drift between the two compose files.

decisions.decision: In-memory dedupe cache instead of Redis
decisions.rationale: Reduces quickstart dependencies to zero external services beyond openmeter itself; acceptable for demo volumes where cross-restart deduplication is not required.
